calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Continued To Jun-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roger R. Kirnos, Esq. of Knight Law Group LLP, T:310.552.2250, for plaintiff/moving party, by Court Call;
Michael Foley, Esq. of Gordon & Rees, LLP, T:415.896.5900 ext.4387, for defendant/opposing party, by Court Call.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF STEPHEN ALEGRE'S Motion For Attorney Fees and Costs is granted in substantial part. Mr. Allegre is awarded fees and costs of $24,500. That is the amount that plaintiffs sought from defendant Ford Motor Company and Ford agreed to pay. There is no equitable or legal reason to award a different amount.

Counsel for Mr. Alegre is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF STEPHEN ALEGRE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production From Defendant Ford Motor Company IS GRANTED And Request For Sanctions IS DENIED.
